changes.summary: Added SearchUseCase (BC-03) with searchPublications and searchCommunities methods extracted from search.router. Preserves query/tag/author/community filtering, user-community scoping, author/community enrichment, and project-community exclusion. Exposes createSearchUseCase factory and SearchResultItem type.
search procedure delegates publications and communities branches to SearchUseCase; polls and users search remain inline. Response shape (results + meta) unchanged.

verification.tsc_changed_files: no errors filtered for changed paths

notes: Polls and users search extraction deferred to follow-up work units outside this bounded scope. searchPublications and searchCommunities retain try/catch swallow behavior so other content types still run on partial failure.
